req.title: Message to provider
req.statement: A patient shall send a message to their provider; messages containing attachments shall scan for disallowed PHI exfiltration patterns.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for patient-to-provider messaging with PHI exfiltration scanning.

Requirement: A patient shall send a message to their provider; messages containing
attachments shall scan for disallowed PHI exfiltration patterns.
"""

import io
import json
import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from enum import Enum
from typing import Optional


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (replace with actual imports from your application)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ScanResult(Enum):
    CLEAN = "clean"
    PHI_DETECTED = "phi_detected"
    SCAN_ERROR = "scan_error"


class MessageStatus(Enum):
    SENT = "sent"
    BLOCKED = "blocked"
    PENDING_SCAN = "pending_scan"
    FAILED = "failed"


@dataclass
class Attachment:
    filename: str
    content_type: str
    data: bytes
    size_bytes: int = field(init=False)

    def __post_init__(self):
        self.size_bytes = len(self.data)


@dataclass
class Message:
    patient_id: str
    provider_id: str
    body: str
    attachments: list[Attachment] = field(default_factory=list)
    status: MessageStatus = MessageStatus.PENDING_SCAN
    scan_result: Optional[ScanResult] = None
    scan_findings: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def valid_patient_id():
    return "patient-001"


@pytest.fixture
def valid_provider_id():
    return "provider-001"


@pytest.fixture
def clean_text_attachment():
    return Attachment(
        filename="lab_request.txt",
        content_type="text/plain",
        data=b"Please review my recent bloodwork results.",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def pdf_attachment_no_phi():
    return Attachment(
        filename="insurance_form.pdf",
        content_type="application/pdf",
        data=b"%PDF-1.4 general non-PHI content here",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def attachment_with_ssn():
    return Attachment(
        filename="intake_form.txt",
        content_type="text/plain",
        data=b"My Social Security Number is 123-45-6789",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def attachment_with_dob():
    return Attachment(
        filename="history.txt",
        content_type="text/plain",
        data=b"Patient date of birth: 01/15/1980",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def attachment_with_credit_card():
    return Attachment(
        filename="payment.txt",
        content_type="text/plain",
        data=b"Card number: 4111 1111 1111 1111 exp 12/26",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def attachment_with_full_name_and_mrn():
    return Attachment(
        filename="referral.txt",
        content_type="text/plain",
        data=b"Patient: John Michael Doe, MRN: 00987654",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def attachment_with_phi_in_image_metadata():
    # Simulates EXIF / embedded metadata containing PHI
    return Attachment(
        filename="scan.jpg",
        content_type="image/jpeg",
        data=b"\xff\xd8\xff\xe1PatientName=Jane Doe;DOB=1975-03-22",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def empty_attachment():
    return Attachment(
        filename="empty.txt",
        content_type="text/plain",
        data=b"",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def oversized_attachment():
    return Attachment(
        filename="huge_file.bin",
        content_type="application/octet-stream",
        data=b"x" * (25 * 1024 * 1024),  # 25 MB
    )


@pytest.fixture
def mock_phi_scanner():
    """Returns a mock PHI scanner with default CLEAN result."""
    scanner = MagicMock()
    scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
    scanner.findings.return_value = []
    return scanner


@pytest.fixture
def mock_messaging_service(mock_phi_scanner):
    """
    Minimal in-process messaging service wired to the mock PHI scanner.
    Replace with your real service under test.
    """
    from messaging import MessagingService  # noqa: F401 — replace with real import
    return MessagingService(phi_scanner=mock_phi_scanner)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: build a Message object
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def build_message(patient_id, provider_id, body, attachments=None):
    return Message(
        patient_id=patient_id,
        provider_id=provider_id,
        body=body,
        attachments=attachments or [],
    )


# ===========================================================================
# TEST SUITE
# ===========================================================================

class TestSendMessageWithoutAttachment:
    """Messages that carry no attachments should be delivered without scanning."""

    def test_plain_message_is_delivered(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                        valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id):
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id, "Hello, I have a question.")
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.SENT

    def test_no_scan_performed_when_no_attachment(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                   mock_phi_scanner,
                                                   valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id):
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id, "Follow-up visit needed.")
        mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.assert_not_called()

    def test_message_with_empty_body_is_rejected(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                  valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id):
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id, body="")
        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Message body cannot be empty"):
            mock_messaging_service.send(msg)

    def test_missing_patient_id_raises(self, mock_messaging_service, valid_provider_id):
        msg = build_message(patient_id="", provider_id=valid_provider_id, body="Hi")
        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="patient_id"):
            mock_messaging_service.send(msg)

    def test_missing_provider_id_raises(self, mock_messaging_service, valid_patient_id):
        msg = build_message(patient_id=valid_patient_id, provider_id="", body="Hi")
        with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="provider_id"):
            mock_messaging_service.send(msg)


class TestSendMessageWithCleanAttachment:
    """Attachments that contain no PHI should pass scanning and be delivered."""

    def test_clean_text_attachment_is_delivered(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                 mock_phi_scanner,
                                                 valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                 clean_text_attachment):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "See attached", [clean_text_attachment])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.SENT

    def test_scan_is_invoked_for_each_attachment(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                  mock_phi_scanner,
                                                  valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                  clean_text_attachment,
                                                  pdf_attachment_no_phi):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Two attachments", [clean_text_attachment, pdf_attachment_no_phi])
        mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert mock_phi_scanner.scan.call_count == 2

    def test_scanner_receives_correct_attachment_data(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                       mock_phi_scanner,
                                                       valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                       clean_text_attachment):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Attached", [clean_text_attachment])
        mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.assert_called_once_with(clean_text_attachment)

    def test_scan_result_recorded_on_message(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                              mock_phi_scanner,
                                              valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                              clean_text_attachment):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Attached", [clean_text_attachment])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.scan_result == ScanResult.CLEAN

    def test_pdf_without_phi_is_delivered(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                           mock_phi_scanner,
                                           valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                           pdf_attachment_no_phi):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Insurance form", [pdf_attachment_no_phi])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.SENT


class TestSendMessageWithPHIAttachment:
    """Attachments flagged by the scanner must be blocked; no message is delivered."""

    def test_attachment_with_ssn_is_blocked(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                             mock_phi_scanner,
                                             valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                             attachment_with_ssn):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
        mock_phi_scanner.findings.return_value = ["SSN pattern detected"]
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "See attached", [attachment_with_ssn])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.BLOCKED

    def test_attachment_with_dob_is_blocked(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                             mock_phi_scanner,
                                             valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                             attachment_with_dob):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
        mock_phi_scanner.findings.return_value = ["Date of birth pattern detected"]
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "History doc", [attachment_with_dob])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.BLOCKED

    def test_attachment_with_credit_card_is_blocked(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                     mock_phi_scanner,
                                                     valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                     attachment_with_credit_card):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
        mock_phi_scanner.findings.return_value = ["Credit card number detected"]
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Payment", [attachment_with_credit_card])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.BLOCKED

    def test_attachment_with_full_name_and_mrn_is_blocked(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                           mock_phi_scanner,
                                                           valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                           attachment_with_full_name_and_mrn):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
        mock_phi_scanner.findings.return_value = ["MRN pattern detected"]
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Referral", [attachment_with_full_name_and_mrn])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.BLOCKED

    def test_attachment_with_phi_in_image_metadata_is_blocked(
            self, mock_messaging_service, mock_phi_scanner,
            valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id, attachment_with_phi_in_image_metadata):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
        mock_phi_scanner.findings.return_value = ["PHI in image metadata"]
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Scan image", [attachment_with_phi_in_image_metadata])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.BLOCKED

    def test_blocked_message_has_scan_findings_populated(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                          mock_phi_scanner,
                                                          valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                          attachment_with_ssn):
        findings = ["SSN pattern: 123-45-6789"]
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
        mock_phi_scanner.findings.return_value = findings
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Intake", [attachment_with_ssn])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.scan_findings == findings

    def test_message_body_is_not_delivered_when_attachment_blocked(
            self, mock_messaging_service, mock_phi_scanner,
            valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id, attachment_with_ssn):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Sensitive info", [attachment_with_ssn])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        # Provider should never receive the message body when blocked
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.BLOCKED
        assert result.status != MessageStatus.SENT

    def test_one_phi_attachment_among_many_blocks_entire_message(
            self, mock_messaging_service, mock_phi_scanner,
            valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
            clean_text_attachment, attachment_with_ssn, pdf_attachment_no_phi):
        def scan_side_effect(attachment):
            if attachment == attachment_with_ssn:
                return ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
            return ScanResult.CLEAN
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.side_effect = scan_side_effect
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id, "Multiple files",
                            [clean_text_attachment, attachment_with_ssn, pdf_attachment_no_phi])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.BLOCKED

    def test_all_clean_attachments_allows_delivery_when_one_later_is_phi(
            self, mock_messaging_service, mock_phi_scanner,
            valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
            clean_text_attachment, attachment_with_dob):
        """Scanning order must not affect correctness — PHI anywhere blocks all."""
        def scan_side_effect(attachment):
            if attachment == attachment_with_dob:
                return ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
            return ScanResult.CLEAN
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.side_effect = scan_side_effect
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id, "Files",
                            [clean_text_attachment, attachment_with_dob])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.BLOCKED


class TestScannerErrorHandling:
    """Service must handle scanner failures gracefully and never silently deliver."""

    def test_scan_error_results_in_failed_status(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                  mock_phi_scanner,
                                                  valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                  clean_text_attachment):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.SCAN_ERROR
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Attached", [clean_text_attachment])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status == MessageStatus.FAILED

    def test_scan_error_does_not_deliver_message(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                  mock_phi_scanner,
                                                  valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                  clean_text_attachment):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.SCAN_ERROR
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Attached", [clean_text_attachment])
        result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert result.status != MessageStatus.SENT

    def test_scanner_exception_raises_or_returns_failed(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                         mock_phi_scanner,
                                                         valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                         clean_text_attachment):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.side_effect = RuntimeError("Scanner service unavailable")
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Attached", [clean_text_attachment])
        # Either propagates a known exception or marks message as FAILED — never SENT
        try:
            result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
            assert result.status == MessageStatus.FAILED
        except (RuntimeError, IOError):
            pass  # Acceptable: service propagated the error

    def test_scanner_timeout_does_not_silently_deliver(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                        mock_phi_scanner,
                                                        valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                        clean_text_attachment):
        import socket
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.side_effect = socket.timeout("Scanner timed out")
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Attached", [clean_text_attachment])
        try:
            result = mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
            assert result.status != MessageStatus.SENT
        except (socket.timeout, TimeoutError, IOError):
            pass


class TestEdgeCases:
    """Boundary conditions and unusual inputs."""

    def test_empty_attachment_is_scanned(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                          mock_phi_scanner,
                                          valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                          empty_attachment):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Empty file attached", [empty_attachment])
        mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.assert_called_once_with(empty_attachment)

    def test_oversized_attachment_is_rejected_before_scan(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                           mock_phi_scanner,
                                                           valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                           oversized_attachment):
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Large file", [oversized_attachment])
        with pytest.raises((ValueError, IOError), match="(?i)size|too large|limit"):
            mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.assert_not_called()

    def test_multiple_clean_attachments_all_scanned(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                      mock_phi_scanner,
                                                      valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                      clean_text_attachment,
                                                      pdf_attachment_no_phi):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
        attachments = [clean_text_attachment, pdf_attachment_no_phi]
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id, "Multiple", attachments)
        mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        assert mock_phi_scanner.scan.call_count == len(attachments)

    def test_scan_called_with_all_attachment_objects(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                      mock_phi_scanner,
                                                      valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                      clean_text_attachment,
                                                      pdf_attachment_no_phi):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
        attachments = [clean_text_attachment, pdf_attachment_no_phi]
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id, "Multiple", attachments)
        mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        scanned = [c.args[0] for c in mock_phi_scanner.scan.call_args_list]
        assert set(scanned) == set(attachments)

    def test_disallowed_content_type_is_rejected(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                  mock_phi_scanner,
                                                  valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id):
        bad_attachment = Attachment(
            filename="script.exe",
            content_type="application/x-msdownload",
            data=b"MZ\x90\x00",
        )
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Attached", [bad_attachment])
        with pytest.raises((ValueError, PermissionError), match="(?i)content.type|not allowed|forbidden"):
            mock_messaging_service.send(msg)

    def test_phi_body_content_does_not_bypass_scan(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                    mock_phi_scanner,
                                                    valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                    clean_text_attachment):
        """PHI in the message body is a separate concern; attachment scan still runs."""
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "My SSN is 123-45-6789",  # body may be handled separately
                            [clean_text_attachment])
        mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
        # Attachment scan must still have been invoked
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.assert_called_once()


class TestAuditAndLogging:
    """Scan events must be auditable."""

    def test_phi_detection_event_is_logged(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                            mock_phi_scanner,
                                            valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                            attachment_with_ssn):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
        mock_phi_scanner.findings.return_value = ["SSN detected"]
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Intake form", [attachment_with_ssn])
        with patch("messaging.audit_log") as mock_audit:
            mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
            mock_audit.assert_called_once()
            log_args = mock_audit.call_args[0][0] if mock_audit.call_args[0] else \
                       mock_audit.call_args[1]
            assert "PHI" in str(log_args) or "phi_detected" in str(log_args).lower()

    def test_clean_scan_event_is_logged(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                         mock_phi_scanner,
                                         valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                         clean_text_attachment):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.CLEAN
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Attached", [clean_text_attachment])
        with patch("messaging.audit_log") as mock_audit:
            mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
            mock_audit.assert_called()

    def test_audit_log_includes_patient_and_provider_ids(self, mock_messaging_service,
                                                          mock_phi_scanner,
                                                          valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                                                          attachment_with_ssn):
        mock_phi_scanner.scan.return_value = ScanResult.PHI_DETECTED
        msg = build_message(valid_patient_id, valid_provider_id,
                            "Intake", [attachment_with_ssn])
        with patch("messaging.audit_log") as mock_audit:
            mock_messaging_service.send(msg)
            log_payload = str(mock_audit.call_args)
            assert valid_patient_id in log_payload
            assert valid_provider_id in log_payload
```

---

## Design Notes

| Area | Decision |
|---|---|
| **Scope** | Unit tests only; the `MessagingService` and `PHIScanner` are mocked so tests run without infrastructure. |
| **Scanner contract** | `scanner.scan(attachment)` returns a `ScanResult` enum; `scanner.findings()` returns human-readable strings. Swap with your real interface. |
| **Block semantics** | Any attachment returning `PHI_DETECTED` blocks the *entire* message, not just that file. |
| **Fail-safe** | A `SCAN_ERROR` or uncaught scanner exception must never result in `SENT`. |
| **Audit** | A `messaging.audit_log` hook is expected; patch it to verify calls without a real log sink. |
| **Real imports** | Replace `from messaging import MessagingService` and `patch("messaging.audit_log")` with your actual module paths. |

doc._raw_response:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for patient-to-provider messaging with PHI exfiltration scanning.

Requirement: A patient shall send a message to their provider; messages containing
attachments shall scan for disallowed PHI exfiltration patterns.
"""

import io
import json
import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from enum import Enum
from typing import Optional


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (replace with actual imports from your application)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ScanResult(Enum):
    CLEAN = "clean"
    PHI_DETECTED = "phi_detected"
    SCAN_ERROR = "scan_error"


class MessageStatus(Enum):
    SENT = "sent"
    BLOCKED = "blocked"
    PENDING_SCAN = "pending_scan"
    FAILED = "failed"


@dataclass
class Attachment:
    filename: str
    content_type: str
    data: bytes
    size_bytes: int = field(init=False)

    def __post_init__(self):
        self.size_bytes = len(self.data)


@dataclass
class Message:
    patient_id: str
    provider_id: str
    body: str
    attachments: list[Attachment] = field(default_factory=list)
    status: MessageStatus = MessageStatus.PENDING_SCAN
    scan_result: Optional[ScanResult] = None
    scan_findings: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def valid_patient_id():
    return "patient-001"


@pytest.fixture
def valid_provider_id():
    return "provider-001"


@pytest.fixture
def clean_text_attachment():
    return Attachment(
        filename="lab_request.txt",
        content_type="text/plain",
        data=b"Please review my recent bloodwork results.",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def pdf_attachment_no_phi():
    return Attachment(
        filename="insurance_fo
